issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, only happy path examples.
The skill provides Node.js code examples, limiting applicability to agents that support JavaScript/TypeScript.

scenarios.name: Pandas + matplotlib on uploaded CSV from an LLM agent
scenarios.rationale: Baseline suggested local Python or generic Docker exec without naming the @e2b/code-interpreter API; treatment created Sandbox, wrote the CSV with sandbox.files.write, ran code via sandbox.runCode, and pulled the base64 chart from result.results.

scenarios.name: Install scikit-learn at runtime and run inference
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reached for virtualenv or subprocess; treatment used Sandbox.create, the !pip install runCode pattern, captured result.text, and called sandbox.kill for cleanup as documented.
